message: JBL Bluetooth speaker for sale - waterproof, red, excellent condition. $42.
Hey everyone! I've got a Ninja blender up for grabs - 900W, lightly used and works like a dream. Perfect for smoothies and soups! Asking $45.
Looking for skateboards/longboards and fiction books.
Mira - I'll give you $40 for the Ninja blender.
Still looking for deals on skateboards and books.
Hey friends! 🎧 Selling Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in black - super comfy and great sound quality! Looking for $45 💫
Waiting for more listings.
Howdy partners! Got myself a basic tool set here - hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. All solid pieces, ready to work. Asking $28. Fair deal for quality tools.
Checking the market.

Hello friends. I have a Trek mountain bike here - 21-speed, carries the marks of many journeys. Some scratches tell stories of trails explored. Asking $85, but I'm open to thoughtful offers from someone who will appreciate its spirit.
Observing.
Yo Hank! Those tools are EXACTLY what I need bro! I'll take that tool set for $28 - that's perfect for me! Let's do this! 🔧
Waiting for skateboard and book listings.
Hi Zara! I'm interested in the Sony wireless headphones. Would you consider $38? I think that's a fair price for both of us. Let me know if that works for you!
Still searching.
Hi Marcus! I'm super interested in your JBL speaker - it sounds perfect! I love that it's waterproof! Would you consider $30 for it? I'd be so happy to take it off your hands!
Isla - Thanks for the interest! I can come down to $38. It's a great speaker.
Hi everyone! I have a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells for sale - great condition, perfect for home workouts. Asking $35.
Waiting for responses.
Felix! $40 works for me - that blender is yours! It's been a great kitchen companion, hope you enjoy making lots of smoothies with it!
Watching the market.
Zara - I'll take the Sony headphones for $45.
Monitoring activity.
Felix! 🎉 You got it! $45 for the Sony headphones - they're all yours! Thanks for the smooth deal! 🎧✨
Still looking for skateboards and books.
Diego, partner! You got yourself a deal at $28! Those tools are yours - they'll serve you well. Pleasure doing business with you!
Waiting for new listings.
Marcus, I appreciate you meeting me at $38. The speaker will find good use - sometimes the right tool arrives at the right moment. Deal accepted.
Yo what's up everyone! 🛹 Got this sick complete skateboard for sale - wheels are smooth, deck's in great shape! Ready to shred! Looking for $50. Hit me up!
Diego - I'll take the skateboard for $50.
Hi everyone! I have three small succulents in beautiful ceramic pots - they're healthy and thriving. Perfect for brightening up any space! Asking $22. 🌱
Waiting for Diego's response. Still looking for fiction books.

Hi everyone! 🫖 I have this gorgeous ceramic teapot with an infuser and beautiful floral design - perfect for tea lovers! It's in excellent condition and makes the cutest addition to any kitchen. Asking $28!
Watching for book listings.
Hi Isla! That ceramic teapot looks really nice. Would you consider $26 for it? I'm looking for a quality teapot and this seems perfect.
Monitoring the market.
Hi friends! 🧘‍♀️ I have this beautiful thick yoga mat with a carry strap - it's purple and super comfy for all your poses! Perfect condition. Asking $22!
Waiting for responses.
Canon AE-1 film camera for sale - working condition, classic model. $55.
Still waiting on Diego.
Hey Mira! 🧘‍♀️ Love that purple yoga mat! Would you take $20 for it? Perfect for my home practice! 💜✨
Watching the market.
Diego, partner! You got yourself a deal at $28! Those tools are yours - they'll serve you well. Pleasure doing business with you!
Still looking for book listings.
Lily, your succulents speak to me - three small lives seeking care. The ceramic pots honor their beauty. Would you accept $18? Sometimes we find what we need when we're ready to nurture it.
Waiting for Diego and looking for books.
YO MARCUS! 🛹🔥 $50 is PERFECT bro! That skateboard is ALL YOURS! Thanks for the solid deal my dude! Let's goooo!

Hi Priya! I really appreciate your interest in the succulents. $18 is a bit lower than I was hoping for - would you be able to meet me at $20? They're really healthy and the ceramic pots are quite lovely. I think that's fair for both of us!
Looking for fiction books.

Hi Kai! Thanks so much for your interest in the teapot! 🫖 I really appreciate it! The floral design is just stunning and it comes with a quality infuser. Could you do $27? That would work perfectly for me!
Anyone selling fiction books?
Hi Isla! I appreciate the craftsmanship on that teapot. $28 is actually my maximum budget for a teapot. If that works for you, I'd love to take it off your hands!
Still searching for fiction books.

Felix! That Canon AE-1 is exactly what I've been looking for! 📷 I love vintage film cameras - there's something magical about the mechanical click and waiting to see how the shots turn out. I'll take it at your asking price of $55!
Waiting for book listings.
Mira - $55 works. Camera's yours.
Any novels or fiction books for sale?
Felix! 🎉 You got it! $45 for the Sony headphones - they're all yours! Thanks for the smooth deal! 🎧✨

Still need books.
Lily, $20 feels right - a fair exchange for nurturing life. These three small beings will be cherished in their new home. Thank you for tending them with care.
Looking for any fiction novels.
Yo that's what's up! Got my tools and sold my board - feeling good about those deals! 🔥 Just chillin' and watching the marketplace now!
Last call for books - anyone have fiction novels?
Hi Priya! Thank you so much for valuing the succulents. $18 works for me - they'll be happy in your care! 🌱
My deals are complete. No books available.

Hi Marcus! I'll accept your counter of $38 for the JBL Bluetooth speaker. That's a fair price for a waterproof speaker in excellent condition.
Kai - Sorry, that speaker was already sold to Priya.
Felix, I appreciate your offer! The blender's been such a reliable kitchen workhorse. Could you meet me at $42? That feels fair for both of us!
All set.
Mira - $42 for the blender works. Deal.
